name: Barbecue Sauce Inspired by Kenny Rogers
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Durkee's bottled red hot sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine all ingredients.
2. Blend on high speed until very smooth.
3. Cook over medium-high heat in a pot until thickened.
4. Remove from heat and allow to cool to lukewarm temperature.
5. Transfer the sauce to a covered container and store in the refrigerator for up to a few weeks or freeze for longer storage (up to several months). Optionally, add a few drops of red food coloring for the color of Kenny's sauce.
